title: Climacteric
content:
I am not wiser for my age,
    Nor skilful by my grief;
    Life loiters at the book's first page,--
    Ah! could we turn the leaf.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Climacteric"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
